title: Appleton Rum'n'Crumbles
description: A fresh and crowd-pleasing Canadian dessert featuring Appellation White Cane Rum, perfectly suited for those with diabetes.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine Almond Flour, Sweetener, Baking Powder, and Vanilla Extract. Stir until well mixed.
Add in the evaporated milk, Appellation White Cane Rum, and applesauce, stirring gently until all ingredients are incorporated evenly.
If desired, sprinkle Coconut Flakes on top of the batter before baking to add extra crunch.
Transfer the mixture into a greased 8x8 inch baking dish. Bake for about 35-40 minutes or until golden brown and firm to touch.
Allow it to cool slightly before serving.
